parameters.query:
SELECT
  a.id,
  a.scheduled_at AT TIME ZONE COALESCE(ps.timezone, 'America/Mexico_City') AS scheduled_at,
  a.duration_minutes,
  a.appointment_type,
  a.status,
  a.session_notes,
  a.google_meet_link,
  p.id AS patient_id,
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name,
  p.email,
  p.phone,
  ps.full_name AS psychologist_name
FROM appointments a
JOIN patients p ON p.id = a.patient_id
JOIN psychologists ps ON ps.id = a.psychologist_id
WHERE a.deleted_at IS NULL
  AND ($1::text IS NULL OR $1 = '' OR a.status = $1)
  AND ($2::text IS NULL OR $2 = '' OR DATE(a.scheduled_at AT TIME ZONE COALESCE(ps.timezone, 'America/Mexico_City')) = $2::date)
ORDER BY a.scheduled_at DESC
LIMIT 50
